meta.title: Fueling American Growth: How Energy Independence Will Power Our Transportation Future
meta.description: Scott Segal, Head of Policy Resolution Group, Bracewell and Giuliani, LLP, spoke during the lunch session. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
